sprint.name: ManagerContext
sprint.goal: Extract ManagerContext with adapter configuration support
sprint.impact: Central context for all manager access

tasks.name: Create ManagerContextConfig Interface
tasks.description: Define configuration interface for ManagerContext with storage and worker adapter options
acceptanceCriteria: Optional paths for saved searches and tag aliases

tasks.name: Extract ManagerContext.ts
tasks.description: Copy and refactor ManagerContext to use adapter configuration
acceptanceCriteria: Accepts ManagerContextConfig or legacy string path
Lazy initialization of all managers preserved

tasks.name: Create core/index.ts
tasks.description: Create barrel export for core module

tasks.name: Integration Test
tasks.description: Create basic integration test for ManagerContext with both adapters
acceptanceCriteria: Test creates ManagerContext with JSONL adapter
Test creates ManagerContext with SQLite adapter

tasks.name: Verify and Commit
tasks.description: Run typecheck, tests, and commit ManagerContext
acceptanceCriteria: Commit message: 'feat: add ManagerContext with adapter support'
